---
title: "Projects"
listing:
  - id: primary
    contents:
      - projects/leapfrog-postgresql.qmd
      - projects/river-braids.qmd
      - projects/ai-workflow.qmd
      - projects/pepeha-mapped.qmd
      - projects/catchment-trends.qmd
    type: grid
    sort: "order asc"
    fields: [image, title, description]
    page-size: 12
  - id: other-work
    contents:
      - projects/far-from-help.qmd
      - projects/other-work.qmd
    type: table
    sort: "order asc"
    fields: [title, description]
---

::: {#primary}
:::

## Other work {#other-work-heading}

Smaller pieces that earn a mention - each here because it shows something the main projects don't.

::: {#other-work}
:::
